title: Couple on a bicycle
calibration: Open Roost on macOS and create or open a message scratchpad.
Hover the mouse over the canvas top-left corner and record canvas_top_left.
Hover the mouse over the canvas bottom-right corner and record canvas_bottom_right.
Hover each color swatch center and record swatches.black, swatches.white, swatches.red, swatches.blue, swatches.green, and swatches.yellow.
Run strokes in order. Select a swatch before the first stroke of each color.
